CustomField.formula: IF( INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDImportClaimed'), 'RDImportClaimed', IF( INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDIndiaImportClaimed'), 'RDIndiaImportClaimed', IF( INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDImport'), 'RDImport', IF( INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'RDIndiaImport'), 'RDIndiaImport', IF( INCLUDES( CognitoGroups__c , 'BullhornIntegration'), 'BullhornIntegration','') ))))
CustomField.label: RD Ingestion Status
